title_en: Workshop for Emerging Leaders — Loyola University Maryland
title_cs: Workshop pro studenty MBA z Loyola University
excerpt_en: Lucie Melicharová presents on recruitment and talent acquisition to the Emerging Leaders MBA Class 2021 at Loyola University Maryland.
excerpt_cs: Lucie Melicharová prezentuje o získávání a rozvoji talentů pro Emerging Leaders MBA Class 2021 z Loyola University Maryland.
